sources.title: Real-time virtual production: a systematic review
sources.citation: Ipek, C., & Demir, A. (2024). Real-time virtual production: a systematic review. Journal of Interactive Media, 12(3), 201-228.
sources.annotation: Systematic review of LED-wall virtual production techniques. Maps feedback modalities to on-set decision workflows; directly informs the present research question.

sources.title: Cognitive load in high-tempo creative work
sources.citation: Nguyen, T. (2021). Cognitive load in high-tempo creative work. Cognition & Practice, 8(1), 44-67.
sources.annotation: Establishes the cognitive-load framing used to interpret decision latency under varied feedback richness.

coverage_assessment: Quick-mode coverage: 2 core/supporting sources identified for the example; production runs target >= 15.
